appSettings.title: Admin Settings
appSettings.logoIconDescription: Upload your brand logo and favicon. PNG or SVG with transparent background recommended.
appSettings.brandColorsDescription: Customize colors used across buttons, links, and highlights.
appSettings.localizationDescription: Configure global timezone and language settings.
appSettings.limitsQuotasDescription: Control how many organizations and users can be created.
appSettings.timezoneHelp: Used for server logs, scheduled tasks, and system timestamps
appSettings.registrationHelp: Allow new users to create accounts
appSettings.socialAuthHelp: Enable login via Google, GitHub, etc.
appSettings.maintenanceModeHelp: Put the platform in maintenance mode
appSettings.logoHelp: Shown in the sidebar and emails. Landscape format works best.
appSettings.faviconHelp: Shown in browser tabs and app launchers. Square 64x64 recommended.
appSettings.primaryColorDesc: Main CTA color — buttons, active states, links
appSettings.unsavedChanges: Unsaved changes will be lost if you navigate away.

payment.title: Payment Settings
payment.stripeDescription: Credit/Debit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay
payment.paypalDescription: PayPal balance, card, and Pay Later
payment.paymentConfigComingSoon: Payment provider configuration will be available in the next update. You can set up your payment provider manually in the meantime.
payment.learnMoreProviders: Click to learn more about each provider
payment.setupRecommendationsDesc: Secure and scalable payment gateway integration with seamless checkout, multi-payment support, and real-time transaction management.
payment.globalSaaSText: Use Stripe as primary + Lemon Squeezy for tax compliance, or Stripe with tax integration.
payment.indiaAsiaText: Use Razorpay as primary for local payments + Stripe for international cards.
payment.simpleSubscriptionText: Use Lemon Squeezy (simplest setup, global tax handling) or Stripe (more control).
payment.existingBusinessText: Check if you already have Stripe or PayPal configured for seamless integration.
payment.webhookConfigDesc: Reliable webhook configuration for real-time event tracking, automated workflows, and seamless third-party system integrations.
payment.afterSetup: After setting up your payment provider, you'll need to configure webhooks for real-time transaction updates.
payment.exampleWebhookUrl: Example Webhook URL (replace with your domain)
payment.configureUrl: Configure this URL in your payment provider's dashboard to receive webhook events for payment status changes, refunds, and subscriptions.

storage.title: Storage Settings
storage.providerDesc: Choose where you want to store files and media
storage.unsavedChanges: Unsaved changes will be lost if you navigate away.

email.title: Email Settings
email.description: Configure your email provider for sending transactional emails.
email.providerDesc: Choose how you want to send emails
email.testEmailDesc: Send a test email to verify your SMTP configuration
email.sendgridSetup: Host: smtp.sendgrid.net • Port: 587 • Username: "apikey" • Password: your-api-key
email.sesSetup: Host: email-smtp.[region].amazonaws.com • Port: 587 • Use your SMTP credentials from AWS
email.testNote1: Fill in all SMTP fields (Host, Port, From Email, credentials)
email.testNote2: For Gmail: use an App Password, not your regular password
email.whatDoesDesc: Connects to your SMTP server and sends an actual test email to verify everything works end-to-end.

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Every company on the platform — their plans, usage, and administrators.
companies.name: Name
companies.noCompanies: No companies yet. Click 'Add Company' to onboard your first one.
companies.addCompanyModalDesc: Onboard a new company, assign a plan, and provision its first administrator.
companies.addressPlaceholder: 123 Market St, Suite 400, San Francisco, CA 94103
companies.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
companies.noPackages: No packages available. Create one under Packages first.
companies.brandingOptional: Branding is optional — you can update it anytime from the company's edit page.
companies.brandColorDesc: Used as the platform accent colour for this company's workspace.
companies.adminNote: This user is created as the company's first ORG_ADMIN and can sign in immediately.
companies.passwordCopyNote: Copy and share it securely — it won't be shown again.
companies.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
companies.editDesc: Update company details, plan, and operational status.
companies.deleteConfirm: क्या आप कंपनी को हटाना चाहते हैं? यह कंपनी और इसके सभी डेटा को स्थायी रूप से हटा देगा।
